criteria_version: search/inclusion_criteria.md §1 (Stage-1 title-abstract screen) — priority batch 8, ranks 700-799
notes: Score range 0.40-0.43; dominant subdomain is construal-level / regulatory-fit basic cognitive research with limited commercial-decision overlap. Include rate expected to drop materially.

decisions.reason: Int J Electronic Commerce 2017 on rating-scale design × extreme-response in consumer product ratings; eligible (commercial consumer-rating context).
PNAS 2017 on network reciprocity in social-dilemma experiments; game-theory cooperation, not commercial compliance; fails §2.1.
BMC Research Notes 2017 on physical-activity intervention during testicular cancer chemotherapy; false positive on 'trial-close'; fails §2.1.
Sociological Science 2016 on choice-status (popularity) × perceived quality; eligible (social-proof mechanism, consumer-decision relevance).
Health Marketing Quarterly 2015 N=242 experiment on mood × framing × personal relevance for health messages; eligible.
J Consumer Marketing 2015 three experiments on product exposure × regulatory fit; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, consumer-persuasion outcome).
Int J Interactive Communications 2013 2×2 experiment on communication-mode × authority × persuasion online; eligible.
Jagiellonian University Repository 2013 experiment on self-affirmation reducing DITF vulnerability; eligible (experimental, DITF, compliance outcome).
Econometrica 2012 on vote-buying × reciprocity-norm; political-economy context, not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Health Marketing Quarterly 2012 2×2 experiment on framing × risk perceptions × regulatory fit for HPV vaccination; eligible.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2011 RCT on HIV screening incentives + opt-out strategies; eligible (RCT, compliance/screening uptake outcome).
J Cognitive Engineering and Decision 2011 on framing/loss-aversion in missile-simulation situation awareness; military simulation, not commercial; fails §2.1.
Australasian J Popular Culture 2011 cultural-studies analysis of American shopping mall; false positive on 'anchor-with-range'; fails §2.1.
Texas A&M 2010 on virtual agents × credibility/liking in travel recommender systems; eligible (commercial context, persuasion mechanisms, recommendation-evaluation outcome).
2010 study on positioning + FITD social-influence technique; eligible (FITD, compliance outcome).
American J Sociology 2007 theory of reciprocity via generalized exchange; theoretical/conceptual, need full text per §4.5.
Nutrition and Health 2003 on framing × nutrition education messages; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior-intent outcome).
Proc Royal Society B 2002 on indirect reciprocity + political reputation in charity donations; donation outcome but political-reputation framing; need full text per §2.1.
Int J Conflict Management 2001 on linking frames × negotiation outcomes; eligible (negotiation experiment).
Communication Monographs 1999 three studies on guilt-based explanation of DITF; eligible.

J Accounting Auditing & Finance 1996 experimental markets study on lowballing × audit quality; eligible (experimental, lowball, pricing outcome — directly on-thesis for lowball technique in commercial context).
Communication in Statistics 1994 on structural nested mean models for trial non-compliance; statistical methodology, not persuasion intervention; fails §2.2.
SSRN field experiment on framing × climate action behaviors; climate-context behavior, need full text per §2.1.
SSRN study on FITD seller preferences for surcharges; eligible (commercial pricing context, FITD, surcharge outcome).
OSF preprint — duplicate of i=475 (Need for Chaos × framing); flag at dedup-extraction.

Thesis on regulatory focus-mode fit × consumer variety-seeking with 10,547-consumer dataset + three experiments across AU/UK/US; eligible (dissertation per §4.8, commercial consumer-decision outcome).
SSRN on randomized discount timing × strategic-customer purchasing decisions; eligible (commercial pricing experiment, customer-purchase outcome).

Australian and New Zealand J Medicine 1998 on pharmaceutical-sales-rep use of six influence techniques (incl reciprocity/commitment) with physicians; eligible (commercial pharma-sales context, multiple persuasion techniques, prescriber-decision outcome).
ClinicalTrials.gov 2025 RCT of blue-light blocking for bipolar manic symptoms; pharmacological clinical trial; fails §2.1.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2024 RCT of calisthenics/plyometrics for child MSK injury reduction; pediatric clinical exercise trial; fails §2.1.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2023 teletherapy intervention for traumatic-brain-injury emotion regulation; clinical, fails §2.1.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2021 RCT of Acceptance and Commitment Therapy for breast cancer survivors' fear of recurrence; clinical, fails §2.1.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2016 RCT of acceptance-based behavioral therapy for generalized anxiety; clinical, fails §2.1.
British J Social Psychology 2025 on similarity/familiarity/liking × social inference strategies; basic social cognition, need full text per §2.1.
Health Communication 2025 PMID on Chinese older adults health-misinformation sharing × relational correction; non-commercial, need full text per §2.1.
Basic and Applied Social Psychology 2024 on guilt cues enhancing DITF; eligible (experimental, DITF, compliance outcome).
JESP 2022 on attitude similarity × liking (positive-dominance over negative); basic social cognition mechanism for liking principle; need full text per §2.1.
PSPR 2022 theoretical review proposing Social Verification Theory; theoretical, need full text per §4.5.
JESP 2020 on novel activities × relationship satisfaction; false positive on 'feel-felt-found'; fails §2.1.
Psychological Science 2020 on measuring WEIRD-psychology cultural distance; methodological/scaling not persuasion; fails §2.2.
Korean J Advertising 2019 on regulatory construal fit × sharing-economy etiquette; eligible (commercial sharing-economy context, regulatory fit, consumer outcome).
JESP 2019 on regulatory fit × organizational-change openness via fairness; organizational/HR, not commercial-consumer; need full text per §2.1.
PSPB 2018 on cultural collectivism × responses to norm violators; political/cross-cultural, need full text per §2.1.
JEP General 2018 on simulational fluency × psychological distance; basic cognitive mechanism research, not commercial; fails §2.1.
PSPB 2018 on feasible vs desirable gifts × psychological closeness; gift-giving consumer context but interpersonal-relationship outcome; need full text per §4.4.
EJSP 2018 on regulatory fit × bottom-rank feedback engagement; learning/feedback context, need full text per §2.1.
SAGE Encyclopedia 2017 entry on open-ended-question survey design; methodological reference, fails §2.2.
Psychological Science 2017 PMID on knowing who likes us vs competes against us; basic social cognition, fails §2.1.
JESP 2016 on liking × perceived similarity in person perception; basic social cognition for liking principle; need full text per §2.1.
PSPB 2016 on psychological-distance × shared-experience amplification; basic affective research, fails §2.1.
JESP 2016 on climate-change myopia × cognitive style × environmentalism; basic environmental cognition, fails §2.1.

Psychological Bulletin 2016 meta-analysis of risk factors for suicidal thoughts; clinical, false positive on 'silence'; fails §2.1.
Psychological Science 2016 PMID on too-much-precision effect; anchoring mechanism but unclear if commercial context; need full text per §5.2.
PSPB 2015 on psychological distance × interpersonal attraction; basic social cognition, fails §2.1.
Psychological Science 2015 on scarcity framing × value perception; eligible (experimental, scarcity, decision-value outcome).
OBHDP 2015 on evidence vs norms in cultural evolution; theoretical-cultural research, need full text per §2.1.
EJSP 2014 on implicit-association × climate-change responses; basic affective research, fails §2.1.
Psychological Science 2014 on spatial orientation × psychological distance perception; basic spatial cognition, fails §2.1.
Canadian J Experimental Psychology 2013 on comprehension × multiple-choice vs open-ended questions; educational measurement, fails §2.2.
Current Directions Psychological Science 2013 review of psychological-distance dimensions; theoretical, need full text per §4.5.
JESP 2013 on psychological-distance × uncompromising consequentialism; basic moral psychology, fails §2.1.
JESP 2013 on psychological-distance × metaphor use; basic cognitive linguistics, fails §2.1.
J Health Communication 2013 N=183 study on nonsmoker reactions to gain/loss antismoking PSAs; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior-intent outcome).
JESP 2013 on regulatory fit × interpersonal-evaluation intensity; basic social cognition, need full text per §2.1.
Industrial Marketing Management 2013 on regulatory fit × channel reward redemption; eligible (commercial-channel-reward context, regulatory fit, redemption outcome).
Health Communication 2012 on authority cue + bandwagon (social-proof) cues × health-message credibility on Twitter; eligible (experimental, authority + social-proof, credibility outcome).
JEP General 2012 on psychological-distance sensitivity reduction; basic cognitive mechanism, fails §2.1.
JEP General 2012 on psychological-distance × information-overload decision making; basic cognitive research, fails §2.1.
JPSP 2012 six studies on advice vs choice idealism × psychological distance; decision-making mechanism, need full text per §2.1.
Psychological Bulletin 2012 history of Gestalt psychology in visual perception; false positive on 'silence'; fails §2.1.
OBHDP 2011 on managerial regulatory-fit priming × reactions to explanations; organizational management, need full text per §2.1.
EJSP 2011 on cultural regulatory fit × coping with unsuccessful outcomes; cultural-cognitive research, need full text per §2.1.
JPSP 2010 on politeness × psychological distance × construal; basic social cognition, fails §2.1.
JPSP 2010 on psychological distance × evaluative-response consistency; basic social cognition, fails §2.1.
Human Communication Research 2010 on self-affirmation × gain/loss-framed antismoking; eligible.
JPSP 2010 on regulatory fit × activity interest; basic motivation research, need full text per §2.1.
JESP 2009 on perceiving emotions felt by outgroups; basic intergroup cognition, fails §2.1.
JPSP 2009 on global vs local perception × psychological-distance estimation; basic perceptual research, fails §2.1.
JESP 2009 on psychological distance × spontaneous trait inference; basic social cognition, fails §2.1.

J Consumer Psychology 2009 on psychological-distance asymmetry across dimensions; basic CLT mechanism research; despite consumer-psychology venue the outcome is perceived distance, not consumer decision; fails §2.1.
Psychological Science 2008 on fluency × psychological distance × abstract construal; basic cognitive mechanism, fails §2.1.
Social Cognition 2008 on expectancy/value × psychological distance × goal gradients; basic motivation research, fails §2.1.
JESP 2008 on regulatory fit × claimed self-handicapping; basic motivation research, need full text per §2.1.
JEP General 2007 Stroop-based test of automatic psychological-distance activation; basic cognitive research, fails §2.1.
Psychological Science 2007 Lieberman 'Putting Feelings Into Words' affect-labeling foundational paper; eligible (seminal affect-labeling mechanism, persuasion-adjacent).
JPSP 2007 on regulatory fit × group power evaluation; basic group dynamics, need full text per §2.1.
JESP 2007 on regulatory fit × category learning; basic learning research, need full text per §2.1.
JESP 2006 on probability × psychological distance × construal/preferences; basic decision research, fails §2.1.
JMR 2006 review on regulatory fit; eligible (review of empirical regulatory-fit literature).
EJSP 2006 on regulatory fit × cognitive test performance; academic-test context, need full text per §2.1.
OBHDP 2006 on leadership style × regulatory mode fit; organizational management, need full text per §2.1.
JMR 2006 commentary on Avnet & Higgins regulatory fit goal-systemic perspective; eligible (theoretical contribution to empirical regulatory-fit literature in marketing context).
Psychological Science 2005 study on Mad Cow crisis × emotion-affect-labeling × beef consumption; eligible (field-level commercial behavior change with affect-labeling mechanism).
JESP 2005 on regulatory nonfit × bias correction in judgment; basic judgment research, need full text per §2.1.
Psychological Science 2005 on resource scarcity × cross-cultural female body-weight preference; not commercial decision; fails §2.1.
2004 thesis on aspiring-principal preparation programs in Florida; education-administration; false positive on 'assumptive'; fails §2.1.
Psychological Science 2004 on linguistic markers around September 11; not commercial; fails §2.1.
PSPB 2004 on imagining how you'd feel × regulatory fit × consumer choice; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, consumer-choice outcome).
